title: Wheelchair with four wheel independent suspension and modular seating
abstract: This invention provides a wheelchair with four wheel independent suspension and modular seating, allowing for customized seat selection and a variable ride. It includes a chair assembly, a chassis assembly and a suspension assembly. The chair assembly includes a seat; a seat mount; a seat angle adjuster; and a pillar. The chassis assembly includes a chassis; and a handle assembly. The suspension assembly includes a forward suspension assembly and a rear suspension assembly. In another embodiment, the wheelchair includes a chair assembly with handles, a main cross beam and a suspension spring assembly.
claims: Claims CLAIMS 1. A wheelchair comprising: a chair assembly; a chassis assembly; and a suspension assembly with wheels. 2. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 1 wherein the chair assembly includes a seat and a seat base. 3. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 2 wherein the seat base is constructed and arranged to enable interchange of the seat in the chair assembly with another seat. 4. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 3 wherein the chair assembly includes a seat angle adjuster and a pillar. 5. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 1 , wherein the chassis assembly includes a chassis member and a handle assembly. 6. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 1 , wherein the suspension assembly incudes a forward suspension assembly and a rear suspension assembly. 7. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 6 wherein the suspension assembly defines unitary spring members onto which the wheels are attached. 8. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 7 wherein the spring members define Euler springs. 9. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 7 further comprising a spring tensioner assembly constructed and arranged to allow adjustment of the spring members. 10. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 6 wherein the suspension assembly defines coil spring members with a spindle onto which the wheels are attached. 11. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 6 wherein the suspension assembly defines a gas traction shock system with a spindle onto which the wheels are attached. 12. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 6 wherein the suspension assembly defines a torsion spring members wrapped around a spindle onto which the wheels are attached. 13. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 1 wherein the wheelchair is comprised of: a removable seat assembly; a mounting pillar; a chassis; a suspension assembly; and a plurality of wheels. 14. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 13 wherein the suspension assembly is an independent suspension system that includes a) two front suspension arms that are connected to an axle at one end and a front wheel at the other, b) two rear suspension arms that are connected to the axle at one end and a rear wheel at the other. 15. The wheelchair as set forth in claim 14 wherein each of the suspension arms is provided with a shock absorber.
